mapper.select: SELECT b.*, m.mem_name AS realMemName, m.mem_name, bs.bid_status_name AS bidStatusName FROM bid b JOIN member m ON b.bidder_idx = m.mem_idx JOIN bid_status bs ON b.bid_status_idx = bs.bid_status_idx WHERE b.auction_idx = #{auctionIdx} AND b.bid_status_idx != 4 ORDER BY b.bid_regdate DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bid ( auction_idx, bidder_idx, item_idx, bid_price, bid_quantity, bid_message, bid_status_idx, bid_regdate ) VALUES ( #{auctionIdx}, #{bidderIdx}, #{itemIdx}, #{bidPrice}, #{bidQuantity}, #{bidMessage}, 1, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, m.mem_name AS realMemName, bs.bid_status_name AS bidStatusName FROM bid b JOIN member m ON b.bid_idx = m.mem_idx JOIN bid_status bs ON b.bid_status_idx = bs.bid_status_idx WHERE b.bid_idx = #{bidIdx}
mapper.update: UPDATE bid SET bid_price = #{bidPrice}, bid_quantity = #{bidQuantity}, bid_message = #{bidMessage}, bid_moddate = NOW() WHERE bid_idx = #{bidIdx} AND bidder_idx = #{bidderIdx} AND bid_status_idx = 1
